calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-14-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-15-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Ken Lamance, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Legalmatch.com.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant Richard K. Rufner.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Legalmatch.com and against Richard K. Rufner as follows:
Principal $10,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest $2,912.33
Attorney's Fees $800.00
Costs $231.60
Total Judgment in the amount of $13,943.93
Judgment signed in open court.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2012 Set For Trial On Jan-14-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-17-2011 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-04-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2011 Set For Trial On Oct-17-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
